nodes.label: Structured JSON Logging (env-aware)
nodes.rationale: JSON (structlog) in production, human-readable in dev; stdout as sink (12-factor). Access logs carry method/path/status/latency/team_id but never API keys or credential values.

nodes.label: Request/Correlation ID Propagation
nodes.rationale: Accept inbound X-Request-ID (only from trusted proxies) or generate one, bind it to the log context, echo it in the response header.

nodes.label: Error Hygiene (no internals in 5xx)
nodes.rationale: 5xx responses return generic bodies while full detail (stack traces, SQL) is logged server-side; Authorization headers, lsk_ keys and credential values are never logged and known-sensitive fields are redacted.
